encounters.trigger: The Weaver's death triggers the summoning of the Astral Overlord.

boss.name: Astral Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Focus to dissipate the Overlord's stellar core while dodging shockwaves.

output.objective: Restore the flow of time within the Observatory before the constellations fade forever.

encounters.trigger: The spores release a distress beacon activating the forge sentry.

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Disables the central core defense system

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry drops the energy barrier shielding the boss.

boss.name: Nebula Core Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Use the key to shut down the core before health reaches zero.

normalized.objective: Shut down the unstable star-forge to prevent a localized supernova.
